entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `title_transliteration` TEXT, `author` TEXT, `title_sort` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `author_sort` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `isbn` TEXT, `publisher` TEXT, `published_year` INTEGER, `genre` TEXT, `cover_url` TEXT, `page_count` INTEGER, `language` TEXT, `notes` TEXT, `location` TEXT, `added_date` INTEGER NOT NULL, `copy_count` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `needs_metadata` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

indices.name: index_books_isbn
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_books_isbn` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isbn`)

indices.name: index_books_added_date
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_books_added_date` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`added_date`)

indices.name: index_books_needs_metadata
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_books_needs_metadata` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`needs_metadata`)

indices.name: index_books_title_sort
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_books_title_sort` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`title_sort`)

indices.name: index_books_author_sort
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_books_author_sort` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`author_sort`)

contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_books_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `books` BEGIN DELETE FROM `books_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_books_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `books` BEGIN DELETE FROM `books_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_books_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `books` BEGIN INSERT INTO `books_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `title_transliteration`, `author`, `isbn`, `location`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`title_transliteration`, NEW.`author`, NEW.`isbn`, NEW.`location`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_books_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `books` BEGIN INSERT INTO `books_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `title_transliteration`, `author`, `isbn`, `location`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`title_transliteration`, NEW.`author`, NEW.`isbn`, NEW.`location`); END
entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `title_transliteration` TEXT, `author` TEXT, `isbn` TEXT, `location` TEXT, content=`books`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '6f7a329f20b207359dfbbfcc51c3edde')
